css.headerContent: color:#505050; font-family:Helvetica; font-size:20px; font-weight:bold; line-height:100%; padding-top:0; padding-right:0; padding-bottom:0; padding-left:0; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle;
css.bodyContent: color:#333; font-family:Helvetica; font-size:13px; line-height:150%; padding-top:20px; padding-right:20px; padding-bottom:20px; padding-left:20px; text-align:left;
css.bodyContenta: color: #11BED4; font-weight:normal; text-decoration: none; word-break: break-word;
css.h1: color:#333 !important; display:block; font-family:Helvetica; font-size:35px; font-style:normal; font-weight:normal; line-height:100%; letter-spacing:normal;  margin-right:0; margin-left:20px; text-align:left;
css.sectionContent: color:#333; font-family:Helvetica; font-size:13px; line-height:150%; padding-top:12px; padding-right:20px; padding-bottom:5px; padding-left:20px; text-align:left;
css.h2: color:#999 !important; font-weight:normal; font-size:26px; display:block; font-family:Helvetica; font-style:normal; line-height:100%; letter-spacing:normal; margin-top:0; margin-right:0; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:0; text-align:left;
css.h3: color:#333 !important; display:block; font-family:Helvetica; font-size:16px; font-weight:normal; line-height:100%; letter-spacing:normal; margin-top:0; margin-right:0; margin-bottom:15px; margin-left:0; text-align:left;
css.h4: color:#333 !important; display:block; font-family:Helvetica; font-size:14px; font-weight:normal; line-height:100%; letter-spacing:normal; margin-top:0; margin-right:0; margin-bottom:25px; margin-left:0; text-align:left;
css.edito: color:#333 !important; display:block; font-family:Helvetica; font-size:16px; font-weight:normal; line-height:100%; letter-spacing:normal; margin-top:50px; margin-right:0; margin-bottom:50px; margin-left:0; text-align:left;
css.featuredTitle: margin-bottom: 15px; font-size:28px; color:#333 !important; display:block; font-family:Helvetica; display:block;
css.featuredDesc: margin-bottom: 10px; font-size:16px; color:#333 !important; display:block; font-family:Helvetica; display:block;
css.imageContent: color:#505050; font-family:Helvetica; font-size:20px; font-weight:bold; line-height:100%; padding-top:0; padding-right:0; padding-bottom:0; padding-left:0; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle;
css.itemTitlea: font-size: 18px; color: #333; text-decoration: none; font-weight: bold;
css.itemSeparator: border-bottom: 1px solid #333; display: block; padding-top: 30px; margin-bottom: 20px;
